business.name: Example Plumbing Services
business.description: We are a trusted local plumbing company serving London and the surrounding areas. With over 15 years of experience, we handle everything from emergency call-outs to full bathroom installations.

hero.headline: Your Trusted Local Plumber in London
hero.subheadline: Available 24/7 for emergencies. No call-out charge.

services.title: Emergency Call-Outs
services.description: Burst pipes, blocked drains, boiler breakdowns — we're there within the hour.

services.title: Bathroom Installation
services.description: Full bathroom fit-outs, power showers, and wet room conversions.

services.title: Boiler Service & Repair
services.description: Gas Safe registered engineers. Annual services and emergency repairs.

services.title: Drain Clearance
services.description: High-pressure jetting and CCTV surveys for stubborn blockages.

about.headline: 15 Years Serving London
about.body: We started as a small family business in 2009. Today, we're proud to be one of London's most trusted independent plumbing firms — known for honest pricing, clean workmanship, and always turning up on time.

seo.title: Example Plumbing Services | London Plumber | 24/7 Emergency Callout
seo.description: Trusted local plumber in London. Available 24/7, no call-out charge. Gas Safe registered. Call 07700 900123.
